entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: The geographical region encompassing several South Asian countries.

entities.name: AFGHANISTAN
entities.description: A country within the South Asia region.

entities.name: BANGLADESH
entities.description: A country within the South Asia region.

entities.name: BHUTAN
entities.description: A country within the South Asia region.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country within the South Asia region and the largest GHG emitter in the region.

entities.name: NEPAL
entities.description: A country within the South Asia region.

entities.name: PAKISTAN
entities.description: A country within the South Asia region.

entities.name: SRI LANKA
entities.description: A country within the South Asia region.

entities.name: GHG BUDGETS
entities.description: Estimates of anthropogenic and natural sources and sinks of greenhouse gases.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: The release of gases that trap heat in the atmosphere, including CO2, CH4, and N2O.

entities.name: CARBON DIOXIDE
entities.description: A greenhouse gas (CO2) that can be sequestered by terrestrial ecosystems.

entities.name: METHANE
entities.description: A greenhouse gas (CH4) analyzed in the GHG budgets.

entities.name: NITROUS OXIDE
entities.description: A greenhouse gas (N2O) analyzed in the GHG budgets.

entities.name: FOSSIL FUEL CONSUMPTION
entities.description: The use of fossil fuels which leads to increased greenhouse gas emissions.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL LAND
entities.description: Land used for agriculture, the demand for which leads to deforestation.

entities.name: DEFORESTATION
entities.description: The clearing of forests, contributing to higher greenhouse gas emissions.

entities.name: TOP-DOWN
entities.description: An approach used to estimate GHG budgets based on atmospheric observations.

entities.name: BOTTOM-UP
entities.description: An approach used to estimate GHG budgets based on inventories and emissions data.

entities.name: DYNAMIC GLOBAL VEGETATION MODEL
entities.description: A model used to synthesize top-down and bottom-up results.

entities.name: GHG INVENTORIES
entities.description: A method of recording and calculating greenhouse gas emissions.

entities.name: GROUND-BASED OBSERVATION UPSCALING
entities.description: A method of estimating emissions by scaling up local observations.

entities.name: DIRECT EMISSIONS
entities.description: The measurement of emissions directly from the source.

entities.name: TERRESTRIAL ECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: Land-based ecosystems that can act as a carbon sink.

entities.name: CO2 SINK
entities.description: A natural or artificial reservoir that absorbs more carbon dioxide than it releases.

entities.name: INDUSTRIAL ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Human-led industrial processes that drive the increase in GHG emissions.

entities.name: RECCAP-2
entities.description: The REgional Carbon Cycle Assessment and Processes-2 project.

entities.name: GLOBAL CARBON PROJECT
entities.description: The overarching project that includes RECCAP-2.
